action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch on DomainNet-345 DG task with Quickdraw as target domain. Published baselines cap around 17% accuracy. Analysis: Need a strong OOD backbone (CLIP ViT-B/16) with proper multi-GPU training, standard augmentation plus grayscale augmentation to bridge the domain gap to Quickdraw's black-stroke-on-white style. Decision: Build complete pipeline with CLIP ViT-B/16, DDP training, 5 epochs for baseline, then submit eval to measure iteration time and get initial score.
